forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 55. Southwest wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.shortForecast: Chance Light Rain then Showers And Thunderstorms
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain before 2pm, then showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 63, with temperatures falling to around 60 in the afternoon. South southwest wind 9 to 22 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

weather_report:
In the quiet hours before dawn, Downtown San Francisco breathes a soft, misty sigh, as the city huddles under a blanket of cloud, kissed by the gentle promise of rain. The temperatures dip to a mild 55 degrees, accompanied by a whispering southwest wind that dances through the streets, carrying with it the scent of impending moisture. As daylight breaks, expect the skies to remain predominantly overcast, with a chance of rain lingering until the early afternoon. By then, more than just a sprinkle will awaken the city, as showers and thunderstorms sweep through, urging the locals to seek refuge or embrace the rhythm of the rain. The mercury will temper slightly, leading to a high of around 63 degrees.

The atmosphere feels dynamic, alive with the promise of renewal. While the marine layer may obscure familiar landmarks, it also wraps the city in a mysterious charm that might call for a cozy sweater or a light jacket as you prepare to greet the day. Practical footwear might serve you well—perhaps to navigate potential puddles or the subtle, slick sheen of damp pavement. A stroll through the Ferry Building or a visit to a cozy café might be ideal, offering warmth and shelter while enjoying a freshly brewed coffee and watching the world pass by amidst the soothing sound of raindrops. While the day may not lend itself to grand outdoor adventures, the embrace of urban life, complemented by the city's unparalleled charm, invites a different kind of exploration—one steeped in comfort and conversation, invigorated by the coming rain.
